brand: Bibele ka ho phetla ha le le leng
docTitle: Bibele ka 'mapa · Bibele ka ho phetla ha le le leng
metaDesc: Latela tatellano ya Testamente ya Kgale, bophelo ba Jesu, le maeto a Paulose hodima 'mapa wa sebele — Bibele e etsahetse dibakeng tsa sebele.

s.kicker: Bibele ka ho phetla ha le le leng · Dimmapa
s.title: Bibele ka 'mapa
s.verse: “Ha re le tsebisa tsa matla a Morena wa rona Jesu Kreste le tsa ho tla ha hae, re ne re sa bue ka ditshomo tse qapilweng ka bohlale, empa re ne re bua re le dipaki tse boneng botlotlehi ba hae.” (2 Petrose 1:16)
s.purpose: Bibele hase tshomo. Ke tlaleho ya batho ba tsamaileng dibakeng, matsatsing, le mabitsong a sebele. Latela ditsela tseo hodima 'mapa, ka tatellano ya nako — tobetsa ntlha, kapa o tobetse ▶ ho tsamaya ka yona mohato ka mohato.
s.ot_kick: ① Testamente ya Kgale — ho pharalla nako
s.ot_h: Ho tloha tlhōlong ho fihla ho kgutlela Jerusalema
s.ot_lead: E seng leeto le le leng feela empa ke phallo ya histori ya topollo ho tloha tlhōlong: tlhōlo le ho wa → moroallo le Babele → pitso (Aborahama) → naha e tshepisitsweng → Phallo → lehwatateng → ho hapa → mmuso → ho arohana → botlamuwa → ho kgutla.
s.je_kick: ② Testamente e Ntjha — bophelo ba Jesu
s.je_h: Ho tloha Bethlehema ho fihla Jerusalema
s.je_lead: Latela bophelo ba Jesu kamoo Dievangedi di bo pheta, ka tatellano — ho tloha tswalong ya hae Bethlehema, ho feta kolobetsong le tshebeletsong ya Galilea, ho pharalla Samaria, ho fihla sefapanong, tsohong le nyolohelong lehodimong Jerusalema.
s.pa_kick: ③ Testamente e Ntjha — maeto a Paulose
s.pa_h: Ho tloha Antioke ho ya dipheletsong tsa lefatshe — Roma
s.pa_lead: Ho tloha Pentekonteng Jerusalema, kamoo evangedi e ileng ya nama ka teng ka nqane ho Judea — ho feta Asia Minor le Yuropa ho fihla pelong ya 'muso. Kgetha le le leng la maeto a mahlano (la pele·la bobedi·la boraro + leeto la ho ya Roma + ka mor'a ho lokollwa) mme o latele diketsahalo tsa Diketso le mangolo a ngotsweng tseleng.
s.foot: Mehlodi · Dibaka di latela mongolo wa Bibele le tshebang e tlwaelehileng ya Bibele (le mabitso a sejwale-jwale moo a thusang). Mabopo, dinoka le matsha di tswa ho data e bulehileng ya jeokrafi (Natural Earth), e nolofaditsweng.
s.contact: Dipotso · maikutlo — Re romelle imeile

eden.name: Edene (Tlhōlo · Ho wa)
eden.note: Lefatsheng le entsweng le “lokileng haholo”, sebe se a kena mme se roba kgokahano pakeng tsa Modimo le batho.
events: Tlhōlo ka matsatsi a tsheletseng — “e ne e le e ntle”
Motho o entswe ka setshwantsho sa Modimo
Ho wa, le ho lelekwa Edene
Tshepiso ya pele ya evangedi — “madinyane a mosadi a tla kgoba hlooho ya noha”

noah.name: Ararate (Moroallo)
noah.today: Thaba ya Ararate, botjhabela ba Turkey kajeno
noah.note: Modimo o ahlola lefatshe le tletseng sebe, empa a boloka bophelo ka lelapa le le leng.
events: Lefatshe le tletseng bobodu
Moroallo, le areka ya Nowe
Selekane sa mookodi — “ho ke ke ha hlola ho eba le moroallo o timetsang”

babel.name: Tora ya Babele
babel.note: Kgahlanong le boikakaso bo fihlelang lehodimo, Modimo o qhalanya puo ya bona le ditjhaba lefatsheng.
events: “A re haheng motse le tora… mme re iketsetse lebitso”
Modimo o ferekanya puo ya bona
Ditjhaba di qhalana lefatsheng (Shineare — hamorao Babilona)

ur.name: Ure
ur.note: Pale ya Bibele ya topollo e qala ka pitso ya motho a le mong.
events: Modimo o bitsa Aborame ho tswa Ure ya Bakalde
“Ke tla o etsa setjhaba se seholo… ditjhaba tsohle di tla hlohonolofatswa ka wena”
Ka tumelo o tloha naheng ya habo

haran.name: Harane
haran.note: Tseleng, a arabela pitso ho ya naheng e tshepisitsweng.
events: Lelapa la Thare le lula Harane
Thare o a hlokahala
Aborame o tlohela Kanana a le dilemo tse 75

shechem.name: Sekeme · Kanana
shechem.note: Naheng e tshepisitsweng lelapa le a thehwa mme selekane se fetela melokong.
events: Ho kena Kanana, aletare ya pele — “ke tla nea madinyane a hao naha ena”
Selekane (Tshim 15) · Isaka · Jakobo
Bara ba Jakobo ba leshome le metso e mmedi — motso wa meloko e leshome le metso e mmedi

egypt.name: Egepeta (Goshene)
egypt.note: Lelapa le fetoha setjhaba se seholo — jwale setjhaba sa makgoba.
events: Josefa, ya rekisitsweng, o nyolohela borena Egepeta
Lelapa lohle la Jakobo le theohela ho balehela tlala
Setjhaba se ntseng se hola sa Iseraele se etswa makgoba

sinai.name: Thaba ya Sinai
sinai.note: Topollo e kgolo ya Testamente ya Kgale — makgoba a fetoha setjhaba sa Modimo.
events: Dikotlo tse leshome le konyana ya Paseka
Lewatle le Lefubedu le a arohana mme ba a tshela
Melao e Leshome, Molao, tabernakele le mahlabelo

kadesh.name: Kadeshe (lehwatateng)
kadesh.note: Ho hloka tumelo ho amoha moloko naha — leha ho le jwalo Modimo o dula le bona.
events: Dihloela tse leshome le metso e mmedi — empa setjhaba se hana ho tshepa
Dilemo tse 38 lehwatateng — mana, leru le mollo
Thoteng ya Moabe, thero ya ho qetela ya Moshe (Dipolelo)

jericho.name: Jeriko
jericho.note: Qetellong ba kena mme ba hapa naha e tshepisitsweng.
events: Jorodane e a arohana mme setjhaba se a tshela
Marako a Jeriko a a wa
Ho hapa Kanana le ho arolwa ha naha

shiloh.name: Shilo (Baahlodi)
shiloh.note: Kaha ho se na kgosi, e mong le e mong o etsa kamoo a ratang — ho hlokahala kgosi ya sebele.
events: Tabernakele e hlongwa Shilo
Potoloho ya sebe–kgatello–topollo (Debora, Gideone, Samsone)
Ruthe — botshepehi mehleng e lefifi, molokong wa Davida

jerusalem.name: Jerusalema · Mmuso o kopaneng
jerusalem.note: Mehla ya kgauta ya Iseraele — le tshepiso ya kgosi e sa feleng.
events: Saule kgosi ya pele, ebe Davida le Goliathe
Selekane sa Davida — “terone ya hao e tla dula kamehla yohle” (2 Sam 7)
Salomone o haha tempele Jerusalema

samaria.name: Samaria · Mmuso o arohaneng
samaria.note: Mmuso o a arohana mme o theoha ha baporofeta ba howa.
events: Ka mor'a Salomone, ho arohana ha Juda le Iseraele
Borapedi ba medimo ya bohata bo iphetang
Elija, Esaya, Jeremia ba howa ‘kgutlang’ — mme ba bolela esale pele ka Mesia

nineveh.name: Ninebe (Asiria)
nineveh.note: Ka ho hlokomoloha ditemoso tsohle, leboya le wa pele.
events: Ninebe, motse-moholo wa Asiria
Mmuso wa leboya o wela Asiria (722 BC)
Jonase o romelwa Ninebe

babylon.name: Babilona
babylon.note: Bosiu bo lefifi ka ho fetisisa — empa tshepiso ya tsosoloso e ntse e le teng.
events: Jerusalema e a wa, tempele e a tjha (586 BC)
Juda e hulelwa Babilona
Daniele le Esekiele — tumelo le dipono botlamuweng

susa.name: Shushane (Persia)
susa.note: Esita le pelong ya 'muso wa bahedene, Modimo o boloka setjhaba sa hae.
events: Persia e hlola Babilona
Esthere o pholosa Bajuda timetsong
Nehemia o rapela pela kgosi mme o a romelwa

return.name: Ho kgutlela Jerusalema
return.note: Ba a kgutla mme ba a haha bocha — empa ha ho kgosi e tlileng. Ba emetse Mesia.
events: Maqhubu a mararo a ho kgutla ka taelo ya Siru (Serubabele 538 · Esdrase 458 · Nehemia 444)
Tempele e hahwa bocha le marako a Jerusalema a lokiswa
Malakiya — Testamente ya Kgale e a kwala: “Ke tla romela leqosa la ka”

bethlehem.name: Bethlehema
bethlehem.note: Mesia ya tshepisitsweng o tla motseng wa Davida — Lentswe le fetohileng nama.
events: O tswaletswe Bethlehema, motseng wa Davida
Mangeloi a tsebisa balisa ditaba
Ba bohlale ba tla ho mo khumamela

nazareth.name: Nazaretha
nazareth.note: Modimo o hola e le motho motseng o tlwaelehileng.
events: O hodisitswe lelapeng la mmetli
A le lilemo tse leshome le metso e mmedi, o botsa le ho araba tempeleng
Hamorao o hanwa sinagogeng ya motse wa habo

jordan.name: Noka ya Jorodane
jordan.note: Tshebeletso ya hae phatlalatsa e a qala — lehodimo le mo tiisa e le Mora.
events: O kolobetswa ke Johanne
Moya o theoha jwaloka leeba — “Enwa ke Mora wa ka ya ratehang”
O hlola meleko e meraro ya Satane lehwatateng

cana.name: Kana
cana.note: Mohlolong wa hae wa pele o senola tlotla ya hae.
events: Moeti lenyalong
Metsi a fetolwa veine — mohlolo wa hae wa pele
Barutuwa ba hae ba dumela ho yena

sychar.name: Sikare (Samaria)
sychar.note: Tsela ya tshebeletso ya pele — ho feta Jerusalema ho ya Samaria e nyedisuweng.
events: O hloekisa tempele Jerusalema
Bosiu, Nikodema — “o lokela ho tswalwa botjha”
Metsi a bophelo ho mosadi wa Samaria

capernaum.name: Kapernauma
capernaum.today: lebopo la letsha la Galilea kajeno
capernaum.note: Motheo wa tshebeletso ya Galilea — ho bitsa, ho ruta le kganyetso di kopana mona.
events: O bitsa batshwasi ba ditlhapi mme o iketsa motheo mona
Thuto ya Thabeng — “ho lehlohonolo ba futsanehileng moyeng”
Ditshwantsho tsa mmuso — le kganyetso e ntseng e hola

galilee.name: Letsha la Galilea
galilee.note: Ka matla holima tlhaho o bontsha hore na ke mang.
events: “Kgutsa, thola” — o kokobetsa sefefo
O fepa ba 5,000 ka mahobe a mahlano le ditlhapi tse pedi
O tsamaya hodima metsi

caesarea_p.name: Sesarea-Filipi
caesarea_p.note: Barutuwa ba utlwisisa hore ke Kreste, mme tsela ya sefapano e a bulwa.
events: Boipolelo ba Petrose — “O Kreste, Mora wa Modimo o phelang”
O bolela pele ka lefu le tsoho ya hae
O fetoha ponahalong ya tlotla thabeng

jericho.name: Jeriko
jericho.note: Tseleng e nyolohelang Jerusalema, o batla ba lahlehileng.
events: O foufolla sefofu Bartimea
O bitsa Sakhewu molekgetho
“Mora wa motho o tlile ho batla le ho pholosa ba lahlehileng”

bethany.name: Bethania
bethany.note: O bontsha matla holima lefu leqhepheng la beke ya hae ya ho qetela.
events: O tsosa Lazaro lebitleng — “Ke nna tsoho le bophelo”
Maria o mo tlotsa bakeng sa poloko
Mohlolo ona o thatafatsa morero wa ho mmolaya

jerusalem.name: Jerusalema
jerusalem.note: Sehlohlolo seo Bibele yohle e se supang — sefapano, tsoho, nyolohelo.
events: Ho kena ka tlotla; o pheta ho phethola ditafole tempeleng
Selallong sa ho Qetela o hlatswa maoto a barutuwa
O shwela sefapanong
O tsoha ka letsatsi la boraro, ebe o a nyolohela lehodimong

antioch.name: Antioke
antioch.note: Kereke e romang moo tshebeletso ho baditjhaba e qalang le ho kgutlela teng.
events: Thapelong Moya o kgetha Barnabase le Saule
Kereke moo balumedi ba ileng ba bitswa ‘Bakreste’ ka lekgetlo la pele
Ntlha ya ho qala maeto a pele, a bobedi le a boraro

seleucia.name: Seleukia
seleucia.note: Boemakepe ba Antioke — ba tsamaya ka sekepe ho ya Kipirose.

salamis.name: Salamise (Kipirose)
salamis.note: Emo ya pele Kipirose — ba bolela evangedi disinagogeng.

paphos.name: Pafose
paphos.note: Matla a bontshwa kgahlanong le ba hanang evangedi.
events: Elima moloi o otlwa ka bofofu
Sergiuse Paulose mobusi o a dumela
Ho tloha mona ‘Paulose’ o etella pele

perga.name: Perga
perga.note: Boemakepe Pamfilia — mona Johanne Mareka o a kgutla.

pantioch.name: Antioke ya Pisidia
pantioch.note: Evangedi e a bulehela ho baditjhaba.
events: Thero e telele ya histori ya poloko sinagogeng
Baditjhaba ba bangata ba thabela le ho amohela lentswe
Ba lelekwa ke kganyetso

iconium.name: Ikonia
iconium.note: Ba bangata ba dumela, empa mahloriso a ba qobella ho tswela pele.

lystra.name: Lisitra
lystra.note: O bitswa modimo, ebe o a tlepetswa ka majwe.
events: O fodisa monna ya holofetseng ho tloha tswalong
Bongata bo leka ho ba etsetsa mahlabelo jwaloka medimo
O tlepetswa ka majwe mme a shiuwa e ka o shwele, empa o a tsoha

derbe.name: Derbe
derbe.note: Ho etswa barutuwa ba bangata; ba boela morao ho matlafatsa dikereke.

troas.name: Toroase
troas.note: Sebaka sa phetoho moo evangedi e qalang ho lebella Yuropa.
events: Pono ya monna wa Masedonia
“Tshelela kwano o tlo re thusa”
Ba tshelela hang Yuropa

philippi.name: Filipi
philippi.note: Kereke ya pele ya Yuropa — evangedi e hlola esita le teronkong.
events: Lidia, morekisi wa lesela le lephepheng, o a dumela
Lekgabunyane le bolelang esale pele le a lokollwa
Difela tsa bosiu, tshisinyeho ya lefatshe, lelapa la molebedi la pholoswa

thess.name: Thesalonika
thess.note: Lentswe le sisinya motse mme kganyetso e a futhumala.
events: O buisana sinagogeng ka Disabatha tse tharo
“Bana ba fetotseng lefatshe ka hohle”
Ba iphunyeletsa bosiu

berea.name: Berea
berea.note: Ba ‘hlomphehang’ ba ileng ba hlahloba lentswe ka bobona.
events: Ba amohela lentswe ka cheseho
Ka matsatsi ohle ba hlahloba Mangolo ho netefatsa
Ba bangata ba fihla tumelong

athens.name: Athene
athens.note: Motseng wa boralefilosofi o bolela ka ‘modimo o sa tsejweng’.
events: O halefiswa ke motse o tletseng medimo ya bohata
Areopago o bolela ka Mmopi le tsoho
O a souwa, empa ba mmalwa ba dumela

corinth.name: Korinthe
corinth.note: O dula selemo le halofo, a thea kereke motseng wa bobe.
events: O etsa ditente le Akwila le Prisilla
“O se ke wa tshaba… hobane ke na le wena”
Bakorinthe ba bangata ba dumela mme ba kolobetswa

ephesus.name: Efese
ephesus.note: Pelo ya leeto la boraro — lentswe le nama ho pharalla Asia.
events: Ho ruta ka matsatsi ohle ka dilemo tse pedi holong ya Turanuse
Dibuka tsa boloi di a tjhesuwa; mesebetsi e matla
Demetriuse setsebi sa silefera o qala moferefere

miletus.name: Mileta
miletus.note: Ho salwa hantle ka meokgo le baholo ba Efese.
events: “Disang kereke eo a e rekileng ka madi a hae”
Baholo ba a lla, ba tseba hore ba ke ke ba mmona hape

caesarea.name: Sesarea
caesarea.note: Ka dilemo tse pedi o sireletsa evangedi pela babusi le kgosi.
events: Ditsheko pela babusi Felikse le Festuse
Boitshireletso ba hae pela Kgosi Ageripa
“Ke ipiletsa ho Sesare” — ho ya Roma

jerusalem.name: Jerusalema
jerusalem.note: O tshwarwa tempeleng, tsela ya hae e le motlamuwa e a qala.
events: O tshwarwa ke bongata tempeleng
O itshireletsa pela lekgotla
E le moahi wa Roma, o romelwa Sesarea a lebeletswe

myra.name: Mira
myra.note: Ba fetela sekepeng sa Aleksandria se lebileng Roma.

fairhaven.name: Mabopo a Matle (Kreta)
fairhaven.note: Temoso ya Paulose ya ho emisa ho tsamaya ka sekepe ha e mamelwe.

crete.name: Kreta
crete.note: Ka mor'a ho lokollwa, sehlekehleke moo a siyang Tite ho lokisa dikereke.
events: O siya Tite ho kgetha baholo motseng o mong le o mong
O bitsa baetapele ba se nang sekoli, ba tshepahalang
O ngola lengolo ho Tite

malta.name: Malta
malta.note: Ka sefefo le ho robeha ha sekepe, tshepiso ya Modimo e a tiya.
events: ‘Sefefo sa leboya-botjhabela’ se robaka sekepe, empa bohle ba 276 ba a pholoha
O longwa ke marabe, empa ha a lemale
O fodisa bakudi ba sehlekehleke

syracuse.name: Sirakuse
syracuse.note: Ba dula matsatsi a mararo Sicily.

puteoli.name: Puteoli
puteoli.note: Ba fihla Italy mme ba amohelwa ke balumedi-mmoho.

rome.name: Roma
rome.note: Evangedi e fihla pelong ya 'muso qetellong — e seng pheletso empa qalo.
events: Dilemo tse pedi tlas'a tebello ya lapeng, a bolela mmuso ka sebete
Ho tloha mona o ngola Mangolo a Teronkong (Baefese·Bafilipi·Bakolose·Filemone)
Hamorao o tlangwa hape, o ngola 2 Timothea mme o bolawa — “Ke lwanne ntwa e ntle, ke phethile lebelo”

journeys.rome: Leeto la bone · ho ya Roma
journeys.j5: Leeto la bohlano · ka mor'a ho lokollwa
